messages.content: I only use WhatsApp, please don't email me.
Understood, I'll contact you on WhatsApp only.
My outstanding amount is ₹45,000 and I can pay by Friday.
Noted. I'll follow up on Friday regarding the payment.
Actually I moved to Bangalore from Mumbai last month.
Got it, I've updated your city to Bangalore.
I work at Razorpay as a senior software engineer.
Please don't call me before 10am, I work night shifts.
Understood, I'll only reach out after 10am.
